title: home body + a way we go
description: Lyrics from home body + a way we go
body:
verse 1

home is in here so i keep the path clear
homies outside walls shape what they hear
knock on the door sound like a kick
count to four before i open it
nerves are shot so i shy from shit
only feel safe when i keep it lit
hats on the rack cover my lid
keys on a chain gotta bang to get in
phones on a cradle y'all, i answer the call
surrounded by numbers, some chance that it's yours
store my hope in the chest and my dress in the drawers
closet gets cluttered when i clean up my floors
what about yours, you keep up with your chores

verse 2

that's the sacrifice
i stand out here so y'all could reach the afterlife
heaven on earth but the universe still demandin life
something gotta burn to give y'all candle light
you just gotta learn that it's yours to handle right
ain't saying i'm the sun there's only one that i can see
but i thank the stars that took their time to shine on me
hold my light up cuz somebody might see
something in the dark and start imagining
making contact with an alien
faith don't fail me then
i believe in a love we can both fit in
but we'll never find out if i don't begin
